headline: Disney (DIS) Plans Shanghai Resort Expansion As Toy Story 5 Builds Its Content Pipeline
summary: Shanghai Disney Resort, part of Walt Disney's global operations, is planning a multi billion dollar expansion that includes new hotels and an additional theme park. The build out sits alongside upcoming theatrical releases such as Toy Story 5 and new animated content that are expected to support the Experiences and film segments. The combined investment in physical assets and content is intended to deepen Disney's presence in the Chinese market and broaden its global entertainment...
